intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 70%, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 70-70% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 70% for 30:00. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/6. 10:00 at 88%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 33% complete. Rep 2/6. 88% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/6. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/6. 88% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/6. 88% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72% for 20:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 58% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 35 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 70 minutes in. 92% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 58% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 58% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 92%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% complete. 20 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% complete. 65% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20 minutes to go. Easy does it. 65% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 95% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-95% FTP, 85-95 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 95% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 91% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 91% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 110 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 110 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
